item.title: How Cold Can We Actually Get?
item.description: From icy winters to extreme temperature records, this video explores how cold conditions can get and what happens when temperatures reach their limits.

media:content.media:title: How Cold Can We Actually Get?
media:content.media:description: From icy winters to extreme temperature records, this video explores how cold conditions can get and what happens when temperatures reach their limits.
